name: ChaCha20-Poly1305
creator: Daniel J. Bernstein
modern_use: TLS 1.3, WireGuard VPN, Android encryption, SSH
description: ChaCha20-Poly1305 is an authenticated encryption algorithm combining the ChaCha20 stream cipher with the Poly1305 MAC. Preferred over AES-GCM on platforms without AES hardware acceleration. Used in TLS 1.3 as a mandatory cipher suite.
notes: Faster than AES on CPU without hardware AES support. Constant-time implementation avoids timing attacks.
did_you_know: Google added ChaCha20-Poly1305 to TLS in 2014 to improve security for Android users whose devices lacked AES hardware acceleration.
